message:
[fix] Fix marketplace.json schema validation - source and repository format

- Changed source from 'ruvnet/claude-flow' to './' (must start with './')
- Changed repository from object to string format
- Fixes schema validation errors for Claude Code marketplace

Co-Authored-By: claude-flow <noreply@ruv.io>

files.patch:
@@ -13,18 +13,15 @@
   "plugins": [
     {
       "name": "claude-flow",
-      "source": "ruvnet/claude-flow",
+      "source": "./",
       "description": "Enterprise AI agent orchestration plugin with 150+ commands, 74+ specialized agents, SPARC methodology, swarm coordination, GitHub integration, and neural training capabilities",
       "version": "2.5.0",
       "author": {
         "name": "rUv",
         "email": "ruv@ruv.net"
       },
-      "homepage": "https://github.com/ruvnet/claude-flow",
-      "repository": {
-        "type": "git",
-        "url": "https://github.com/ruvnet/claude-flow.git"
-      },
+      "homepage": "https://claude-flow.ruv.io",
+      "repository": "https://github.com/ruvnet/claude-flow",
       "bugs": {
         "url": "https://github.com/ruvnet/claude-flow/issues"
       },
